name: Alaska Airlines Visa Signature® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 80,000 bonus points and a $99 Companion Fare (plus taxes and fees from $23) after spending $4,000 or more on purchases within the first 120 days.

earning_rates.notes: On Alaska Airlines tickets, vacation packages, and cargo purchases
On gas, local transit including rideshare, and shipping

other_benefits.name: Companion Fare
other_benefits.description: $99 Companion Fare (plus taxes and fees from $23) each account anniversary

other_benefits.name: Free First Checked Bag
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for cardholder when booking with card

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Priority boarding when paying with card

other_benefits.name: Alaska Lounge+ Discount
other_benefits.description: $100 discount off an annual Alaska Lounge+ Membership

other_benefits.name: 10% Rewards Bonus
other_benefits.description: 10% bonus on all miles earned from card purchases with eligible BofA business account
